<body class="archive post-type-archive post-type-archive-product wp-theme-TrastPro theme-TrastPro woocommerce-shop woocommerce woocommerce-page woocommerce-no-js">
<div class="overlay"></div>

<header class="header" id="header">
<div class="header-main">
<div class="container">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="header-top row">
<div class="col-xl-auto col-lg col">
<div class="logo-wrap">
<div class="mobile-toggle">
<div class="hamburger toggle-nav" id="hamburger">
<div class="hamburger-box">
<div class="hamburger-inner"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<a href="/" class="header-logo">
<img src="https://trast-zapchast.ru/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/l1.svg" alt="ТрастЗапчасть" width="175" height="44">
</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-xl col-lg-12">
<div class="header-middle">
<div class="dropdown header-dropdown">
<button type="button" class="btn btn--accent btn--medium btn--with header-catalog">
<svg class="icon">
<use href="#icon_bars"></use>
</svg>
<svg class="icon-2">
<use href="#icon_x"></use>
</svg>
<span>Каталог</span>
</button>
</div>

<div class="header-search search-wrap">
<form class="trast-search search" action="/">

</svg></button>
<button type="submit" class="search-submit">Поиск</button>
</div>
</form>

<div class="modal modal--success" id="modal_success">
<div class="modal-container">
<div class="modal-wrap">
<div class="modal-close close-icon">
<svg width="16" height="16" fill="#000">
<use href="#icon_x"></use>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="modal-icon">
<svg width="48" height="48" fill="rgb(var(--primary-accent))">
<use href="#icon_form_success"></use>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="modal-title">Заявка успешно отправлена</div>
<div class="modal-desc">Мы уже получили ваше обращение и вернемся с обратной связью как можно скорее</div>
<button type="button" class="btn btn--gray modal-close">Закрыть</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="modal modal--search" id="modal_search">
<div class="modal-container">
<div class="modal-wrap">
<div class="modal-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<div class="header-search mobile-search search-wrap">
<div class="modal-close close-icon">
<svg width="24" height="24" fill="#000">
<use href="#icon_arrow_right"></use>
</svg>
</div>
<form class="trast-search search" action="/">
<svg class="icon-search">
<use href="#icon_search"></use>
</svg>
<input type="text" name="s" class="search-input" placeholder="Поиск по каталогу" value="">
<div class="search-actions">
<button type="button" class="search-clear"><svg class="icon">
<use href="#icon_x"></use>
</svg></button>
</div>
</form>
<div class="search-results custom"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Yandex.RTB R-A-2557738-4 -->
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", () => {
const render = (imageId) => {
return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
window.yaContextCb.push(() => {
Ya.Context.AdvManager.render({
"renderTo": imageId,
"blockId": "R-A-2557738-4",
"type": "inImage",
"onRender": resolve,
"onError": reject,
"altCallback": reject
})
})
})
}
const renderInImage = (adImagesCounter, images) => {
if (adImagesCounter <= 0 || !images.length) {
return
}
const image = images.shift()
image.id = `yandex_rtb_R-A-2557738-4-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`
if (image.tagName === "IMG" && !image.complete) {
image.addEventListener("load", () => {
render(image.id)
.then(() => renderInImage(adImagesCounter - 1, images))
.catch(() => renderInImage(adImagesCounter, images))
}, { once: true })
} else {
render(image.id)
.then(() => renderInImage(adImagesCounter - 1, images))
.catch(() => renderInImage(adImagesCounter, images))
}
}
renderInImage(5, Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".ya-image")))
}, { once: true })
</script>
